summary: Tested Distribution module redesign with sidebar navigation. All 9 sidebar nav items work correctly, switching content as expected. Header displays distributor info with Edit button. Emerald color scheme properly applied.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution module redesigned with vertical sidebar navigation replacing horizontal tabs. All navigation items working: Overview, Coverage, Locations, Margin Matrix, Accounts, Stock In, Stock Out, Settlements, Reconciliation. Emerald color scheme applied via CSS variables.

tab_content_verification.details: Shows 7 deliveries with detailed table including delivery numbers, SKUs, quantities, prices, earnings, adjustments, status
Shows customer-grouped settlements: Empire Restaurant (3 settlements), Lead Seventeen Test (2 settlements), Grand Total row

emerald_color_scheme.css_variables: PASSED - Defined in index.css for light and dark modes
emerald_color_scheme.sidebar_usage: PASSED - Active states use emerald-50, emerald-600, emerald-700 classes

design_review.sidebar_layout: Clean vertical navigation with grouped sections (General, Operations, Commercial, Transactions, Financial)
design_review.active_state: Emerald highlight with left border indicator and chevron icon
design_review.counts_display: Badge counts shown for sections with data

design_review.typography: Clear hierarchy with section labels in uppercase, item labels in regular weight
